form.formComment: Resuming after three months. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at Ascot in the G1 Clarence House Steeple Chase January 17 over 3370m. When resuming last campaign 2 in a small field at Ascot in the G2 1965 Chase November 22 over 4200m, 9 len behind Jango Baie with 73kg at $3.80. Could play a big part.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up finished third in a small field at Cheltenham in the G2 Cotswold Chase on January 24 over 5100m, slow track; 5 len behind Spillane's Tower with 74.5kg at $2. Last start finished fourth of 10 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Cheltenham Gold Cup on March 13 over 5300m, 16 len behind Gaelic Warrior with 74.5kg at $17. One of two for Dan Skelton and Harry Skelton rides

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made a mistake jumping the second last fence.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after two to post a big 10 len win. Cheltenham in a G1 Ryanair (Festival Trophy) Steeplechase on March 12 over 4100m defeating Jonbon carrying 74.5kg at $5.50 in a jumps. Previously second-up finished fourth of 10 runners at Punchestown in the G1 John Durkan Memorial Punchestown Chase on November 23 over 3922m, 31 len behind Gaelic Warrior carrying 75.5kg at $11. He has a lot of ability and rates as the one to beat.

form.formComment: Comes off a 29 day let-up. Last start finished fourth of 7 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Ryanair (Festival Trophy) Steeplechase on March 12 over 4100m, 16 len behind Heart Wood carrying 74.5kg at $19. Run before won by 2.75 len Musselburgh on January 31 over 4100m defeating Tommy's Oscar carrying 76kg at $5 in a steeplechase. Holds interesting claims and not ruled out.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after three months finished third of 10 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Queen Mother Champion Chase on March 11 over 3200m, 11 len behind Il Etait Temps with 74.5kg at $7.50. Previously second-up came from midfield; finished third in a small field at Sandown Park in the G1 Tingle Creek Chase on December 6 over 3100m, 18 len behind Il Etait Temps with 74.5kg at $4.50. Place claims at best.

form.formComment: Freshened for 30 days. Last outing pulled up at Cheltenham in the G1 Queen Mother Champion Chase on March 11 over 3200m. Start before finished second in a small field at Newbury in the G2 Game Spirit Chase on February 7 over 3300m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Lulamba carrying 71kg at $7. Finds a few better today. Looking elsewhere.

form.formComment: Resuming after a two months break. Finished off last campaign 5 in a small field at Leopardstown in the G1 Dublin Chase February 1 over 3419m, slow track; 87 len behind Majborough carrying 75.5kg at $6. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len Leopardstown G1 Paddy's Reward Club Chase December 27 over 3419m defeating Marine Nationale carrying 75.5kg at $9. Not ruled out if staying the trip.
